title: Chubby Blåhaj | not only anymore!
description:
Chubby version of toy shark, Blåhaj.
and other plushy.
body:
### A Minecraft mod that adds the IKEA BLÅHAJ (but chubby) and other plushy as items.

![all plushies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c3166cf872de6172ae6aaaeefe0a8e7058e3660.png)

**(Free use for modpacks)**
